title: SONOS Era 100 Wireless Multi-room Speaker with Amazon Alexa - White

keySpecs.label: Wirelessly connect to other Sonos speakers

crossSellProducts.title: SANDSTROM Black Series S3HDM115 High Speed HDMI Cable with Ethernet - 3 m

description.main: They say good things come in small packages. This Sonos Era 100's compact design lets you place it anywhere in the house, so you can get your groove on wherever the rhythm takes you. Don't let its size fool you though - the separate woofer and tweeter speakers provide a wide acoustic range, high degree of clarity, and depth of sound. Download the Sonos app and things get really clever. TruePlay tuning technology analyses the acoustics of your room and then tweaks the EQ of the speaker, so your tunes sound at their best.
goodToKnow: With WiFi and Bluetooth, you can easily stream from any of your devices with no ugly cables in sight
Pair it with additional Sonos speakers (sold separately) for a wider stereo sound, or create your own surround sound system for movie night
It's super-simple to set up – just plug it in, connect your device, open the Sonos app and you're good to go
There's loads of free music, original content and live stations on Sonos Radio
With Sonos Voice Control and Amazon Alexa built in, you can control the speaker using just your voice
Feeling old-school? Plug in your turntable using an aux cable and Sonos line-in adapter (both sold separately) and jam to your favourite vinyl
